nodes.name: Casqued cacique
nodes.summary: Casqued cacique（Cacicus oseryi）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Casqued cacique。

nodes.name: Cacicus
nodes.summary: Cacicus（Cacicus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10种鸟类，如Solitary cacique、Golden-winged cacique、Ecuadorian cacique等10种鸟类。

nodes.name: Casqued cacique
nodes.summary: The casqued cacique (Cacicus oseryi), formerly the casqued oropendola, is a species of bird in the family Icteridae. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Ecuador, and Peru. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. References
